string.name: module_desc
string.value: AR 寻星、观测规划与智能星空摄影

string.name: camera_permission_reason
string.value: 用于 AR 星空叠加和普通星图手势控制

string.name: gyroscope_permission_reason
string.value: 用于平滑跟踪设备转动并稳定 AR 天穹

string.name: accelerometer_permission_reason
string.value: 用于识别重力方向并稳定 AR 天穹

string.name: location_permission_reason
string.value: 用于计算当前地点可见天体和赤道仪目标坐标
